title: Prompt Lifecycle, Monitoring, and Production Capstone · Evaluation Brief: Online Monitoring
summary: Ship and maintain a cross-provider prompt system with regression evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt online monitoring increment in a production prompt portfolio and release gate. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Monitor outcome, refusal, tool, latency, cost, and drift signals without logging sensitive content unnecessarily.
Block prompt releases on material deterministic, rubric, safety, or human-review regressions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Build Online Monitoring evidence
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-online-monitoring-xtvmni" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Online Monitoring into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-online-monitoring-xtvmni
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
